mapper.select: /* McashMapper.getUserInfoBySvcCntrNo */ SELECT CNTR.USERID , SUB.CUSTOMER_ID , SUB.CONTRACT_NUM , SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB , MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG CNTR WHERE SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo} AND SUB.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = CNTR.SVC_CNTR_NO

SELECT /* McashMapper.getMcashAvailableCntrList */ CNTR.USERID , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MOBILE_NO , SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO , ( SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP WHERE RATE_CD = FEA.SOC ) AS RATE_NM , CASE WHEN SUBSTR( CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(NVL(CUS.CUSTOMER_SSN, ' ')), 7, 1 ) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' || SUBSTR( CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(NVL(CUS.CUSTOMER_SSN, ' ')), 0, 6 ) WHEN SUBSTR( CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(NVL(CUS.CUSTOMER_SSN, ' ')), 7, 1 ) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' || SUBSTR( CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(NVL(CUS.CUSTOMER_SSN, ' ')), 0, 6 ) END AS BIRTH_DT , DECODE( ( SELECT 1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'McashDenyRate' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE AND DTL_CD = FEA.SOC ), 1, 'Y', 'N') AS DENY_RATE_YN FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG CNTR , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP CUS , NMCP_MCASH_USER MCASH , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP FEA WHERE UPPER(CNTR.USERID) = UPPER(#{userid}) AND CNTR.SVC_CNTR_NO = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND SUB.CUSTOMER_ID = CUS.CUSTOMER_ID AND CUS.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' AND CUS.CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD IN ('01','05') AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = FEA.CONTRACT_NUM AND FEA.APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND FEA.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND CNTR.USERID = MCASH.USERID (+) AND CNTR.SVC_CNTR_NO = MCASH.CONTRACT_NUM (+) AND ( MCASH.STATUS IS NULL OR MCASH.STATUS = 'C' ) ORDER BY CNTR.REP_NO ASC

SELECT /* McashMapper.getMcashJoinInfo */ A.USERID , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(STRT_DTTM, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS STRT_DTTM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MOBILE_NO , ( SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP WHERE RATE_CD = C.SOC ) AS RATE_NM FROM NMCP_MCASH_USER A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP B , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.STATUS = 'A' AND B.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND C.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND C.APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND UPPER(A.USERID) = UPPER(#{userid})
